title: Integrate ambient listening toggle + privacy indicator into voice/page.tsx

context_files.reason: Ambient listening UI requirements: toggle, privacy indicator, configurable on/off

acceptance_criteria: Ambient listening toggle added to voice surface control panel (default OFF)
Privacy indicator visible when ambient listening is active (e.g., '🔴 ambient learning active')
AmbientListener instance created on mount, destroyed on unmount
Toggle persists preference to localStorage key 'prestix-ambient-listening-enabled'
Toggle button styled consistently with existing mode/recognition/lang controls
Does NOT auto-start speech recognition for ambient capture (manual user activation only)
Does NOT modify any Phase 2 UX refactor changes — strictly additive
